bins.name: Consistent interconnection study rules
bins.desc: ACC supports clearer, more consistent rules for studying and processing large-load interconnection requests. Current regional variation creates uncertainty around project timelines and upgrade responsibilities, which the rulemaking should address.
quotes: Chemical manufacturing relies on highly reliable and competitively priced electricity, and many future facilities will require transmission-level interconnection in order to expand or modernize operations to meet the increasing demands driven by AI, Data Center, and domestic manufacturing.
Current practices for connecting large loads to the transmission system vary across regions and often create uncertainty for project timelines and upgrade responsibilities.
Ensuring reliable electricity access for these facilities is essential to maintaining U.S. competitiveness in advanced technologies.

bins.name: Chemical sector electricity access
bins.desc: ACC argues that chemical manufacturing, as a supplier to the semiconductor and AI industries, requires reliable and competitively priced transmission-level electricity. Securing that access is framed as a national competitiveness priority.
quotes: Chemical manufacturing relies on highly reliable and competitively priced electricity, and many future facilities will require transmission-level interconnection in order to expand or modernize operations to meet the increasing demands driven by AI, Data Center, and domestic manufacturing.

Chemical manufacturing underpins the semiconductor and artificial intelligence supply chain by providing the critical materials, process chemicals, and infrastructure inputs required for chipmaking and modern data center development.
Ensuring reliable electricity access for these facilities is essential to maintaining U.S. competitiveness in advanced technologies.

bins.name: Regional process inconsistency
bins.desc: ACC notes that large-load interconnection practices vary across regions, creating uncertainty for industrial project timelines and upgrade cost responsibilities.
quotes: Current practices for connecting large loads to the transmission system vary across regions and often create uncertainty for project timelines and upgrade responsibilities.
